items.title: Armed man killed by authorities trying to enter Trump Mar-a-Lago club
items.description: President Donald Trump, who narrowly avoided being assassinated in 2024, was not at Mar-a-Lago when the man was killed.

items.title: The next U.S.-Iran talks will be held on Thursday in Geneva, Oman says

items.title: Trump demands Netflix fire Susan Rice as DOJ probes Warner deal
items.description: Rice argued during a podcast last week that "it is not going to end well" for corporations, news organizations, and law firms that "bent the knee" to ...

items.title: Trump approves disaster assistance to D.C. to help with sewage spill into Potomac River
items.description: FEMA announced Trump's approval, allowing the agency to provide resources to help with the response to the Jan. 19 spill after a pipeline ruptured.

items.title: JPMorgan concedes it closed Trump's accounts after Jan. 6 attack on the Capitol
items.description: Trump sued JPMorgan Chase for $5 billion, alleging that his accounts were closed for political reasons, disrupting his business operations.
